sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 283 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection NO. 27. 2. For orders on CMA No. 2189/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 12.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Usman Alam, advocate for applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
